violations.text: Oven was not in good repair and is not currently working. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Service call has been placed and is expected today. Foods are being prepared and received from Tiverton Middle School. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the gym (dining area), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023
The gauge located in the dishwasher area was not in good repair. Gauge shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The walls in the dishwashing area observed in poor repair. Coating observed peeling and chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -The walls in the are constructed of sheet rock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back gym area, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
Gauge at the dishwasher was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023

The walls in the 3 bay sink area oserved in poor repair. Coating on walls observed peeled/chipped. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -The walls in the dishwasher side are constructed of sheet rock. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
